title: A Thousand May Fall

sections.label: Verse
lines: Beneath the wings where shadows lie
Finding refuge up in the sky
No fear of arrows at dawn's break
Sheltered in love with each step we take

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Night may come with its ghostly flight
We'll stand firm in the darkest night
With whispers of grace the winds will call
In His fortress we will never fall

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A thousand may fall at your side
Ten thousand more at your right
But faith will keep you strong and bright
In His love you take your flight

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Plagues and snares won't make us weak
In His shadow our refuge we seek
With voices raised to the highest height
Walking by faith and not by sight

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Angels guard with outstretched hands
In every place where courage stands
Treading on lions with fearless might
The path is clear in the darkest night

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A thousand may fall at your side
Ten thousand more at your right
But faith will keep you strong and bright
In His love you take your flight

epigraph: A thousand shall fall at thy side
